title: Direct database queries without $wpdb->prepare()
summary: Direct SQL queries should use $wpdb->prepare() to prevent SQL injection attacks.

detection.notes: Detects $wpdb methods with variable interpolation. May flag prepared statements incorrectly.

guidance.why_it_matters: SQL injection is one of the most dangerous vulnerabilities. Attackers can read, modify, or delete your entire database if queries include unescaped user input.
guidance.fix: Always use $wpdb->prepare() when including variables in SQL queries.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. May flag queries that already use prepare() if the pattern matching isn't perfect.
